| ------------- | ----------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------- |

| `B1`          | BIST Test Mode                            | [TCPC_CONTROL.BISTTestMode]                       |
| `B0`          | Plug Orientation                          | [TCPC_CONTROL.PlugOrientation]                    |
